𝗣𝗔𝗗𝟯𝗥-𝗣𝗨𝗕𝗟𝗜𝗖 | Reconstructing dynamic 3D objects from casual monocular videos.  🔥 Super Hot!

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Reconstructing dynamic 3D objects from casual monocular videos.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Reconstructs dynamic 4D objects from single casual monocular videos
✅ Jointly models object deformation and camera motion
✅ Three-stage reconstruction pipeline: Static 3D, PoseNet, Dynamic 4D
✅ Utilizes Zero123 SDS, SuGaR, Gaussian Splatting, DINOv2, and CoTracker3


✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐ 14 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

PAD3R is a Python-based pipeline for reconstructing dynamic 3D objects from a single casual monocular video. It achieves this by jointly modeling object deformation and camera motion through a three-stage process involving static 3D reconstruction, camera pose estimation, and dynamic 4D reconstruction.

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/pad3r/pad3r-public

𝗦𝗣𝗔𝗚𝟰𝗗 | Transforming panoramic photos into interactive 3D environments using Gaussian Splatting technology.  🔥 Super Hot!

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Transforming panoramic photos into interactive 3D environments using Gaussian Splatting technology.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Conversion of 360° panoramas to 3D Gaussian Splats
✅ Multiple generator backends: DA360, DAP, SHARP 360
✅ Depth-based projection via spherical geometry
✅ Direct Gaussian prediction using Apple's SHARP model
✅ Optional refinement with GSFix3D (diffusion inpainting)
✅ Optional refinement with OmniRoam v2 (trajectory-coherent video generation)
✅ Optional pre-processing upscaling with SeedVR2
✅ Web UI for easy usage


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

⭐⭐⭐ 138 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 13 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 4 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

SPAG-4D is a Python-based tool that converts 360° equirectangular panoramic images into explorable 3D Gaussian Splat scenes. It offers multiple generator backends for depth estimation and direct Gaussian prediction, with optional refinement steps to fill disocclusions and improve visual quality.

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/cedarconnor/SPAG4d

𝗚𝗦𝗔𝗣 | Creating high-performance, complex animations for web development across all major browsers.  🔥 Super Hot!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Creating high-performance, complex animations for web development across all major browsers.
📅 Created: Sep 2012 • Updated: Apr 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Framework-agnostic JavaScript animation library
✅ High-performance animations
✅ Works in every major browser
✅ Animates CSS, SVG, canvas, React, Vue, WebGL, colors, strings, motion paths, generic objects
✅ ScrollTrigger plugin for scroll-based animations
✅ gsap.matchMedia() for responsive and accessible animations
✅ Zero dependencies
✅ Optional plugins for advanced effects (MorphSVG, SplitText, MotionPathPlugin, Flip, Observer)
✅ CDN and NPM installation options


┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

🍴 2K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 9 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

GSAP (GreenSock Animation Platform) is a high-performance JavaScript animation library for the modern web. It enables developers to create complex animations across all major browsers for various elements like CSS, SVG, and even generic JavaScript objects, with optional plugins for advanced effects like scroll-based animations and motion paths.

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📅 Created: Dec 2021 • Updated: Apr 2026

✅ Full compatibility with Redis and Memcached APIs
✅ 25X higher throughput compared to legacy datastores
✅ Lower tail latency and higher cache hit rates
✅ Up to 80% less resource utilization for the same workload
✅ Built for modern application workloads

Dragonfly is a high-performance, in-memory data store designed as a modern replacement for Redis and Memcached. It offers significantly higher throughput and lower latency, requiring no code changes for adoption and utilizing resources more efficiently.

Promptfoo is a command-line interface and library designed for testing, evaluating, and red-teaming Large Language Model (LLM) applications. It enables developers to compare the performance of different models, automate checks in CI/CD pipelines, and scan for vulnerabilities to ensure secure and reliable AI app deployment.
